description: Source links for orthopaedic theatre consumables — surgical drapes, sutures, bone cement, irrigation, tourniquets, gloves

entries.notes: Orthopaedic procedure drape for hip and knee replacement. Drisite Plus fluid handling zones: dry barrier, strong barrier, absorbent barrier. Integrated adhesive edges to prevent micro-organism migration.
Extremity draping set for hand, foot, and lower limb procedures. Product code variant 60204. Drisite Plus absorption. Sterile single-use.
Vertical isolation drape for orthopaedic procedures. Product code variant 80008032. Creates sterile barrier between sterile and non-sterile field.

Customised sterile procedure trays for hip, knee and shoulder replacement. Contains all single-use equipment for specific procedures. Can include BARRIER drapes, gloves, and other consumables. Configured per procedure.
Thickest synthetic surgical glove. Brown colour to reduce glare. Extra-durable for orthopaedic procedures. Biogel inner coating for wet donning. Sizes 5.5–9.0.
Thick and durable synthetic surgical glove. Biogel coating for easy donning with damp hands. Sizes 5.5–9.0. Powder-free.
Green latex underglove for puncture detection when worn beneath outer Biogel glove. Puncture indicated by green colour showing through outer glove.

Iodine-impregnated adhesive incise drape. 6600 Series. Broad-spectrum antimicrobial to incision edge. EZ Delivery design. Not natural rubber latex. Active against MRSA (6 hr contact ex vivo). Sizes: 6640EZ (23x23 in, incise 13x13 in), 6650EZ (17x23 in). Available on Solventum.com.
Non-antimicrobial incise drape for sterile field coverage. Model 2040 incise area 28x41 cm (11x16 in); Model 2045 incise area 50x45 cm (19.6x17.6 in). Sterile, single-use.

Synthetic absorbable braided suture. 90% glycolide + 10% L-lactide copolymer. 2–4 weeks tissue support. Available dyed (violet) and undyed. Multiple sizes and needle configurations. Indicated for soft tissue approximation, orthopaedic closures, general surgery.

VICRYL with Irgacare MP (Triclosan) antibacterial agent (max 2360 ug/m). Inhibits bacterial colonisation of suture in vitro. Same absorption profile as standard VICRYL. Smooth tissue passage, good knot security.

Synthetic absorbable monofilament. Polydioxanone. Absorption 182–238 days. 80% strength at 14 days (sizes 3-0+), 40% at 28 days. Extended wound support up to 6 weeks. Available clear and violet. Sizes 2-0, 3-0, 4-0. Needle types: FS-1, PS-2, CP-1 (19–36 mm). Use: soft tissue approximation, orthopaedic deep tissue.

Monofilament synthetic absorbable suture. Copolymer of glycolide and epsilon-caprolactone. Soft tissue approximation and ligation. Smooth tissue passage. Fast absorption profile (faster than PDS). Also available as MONOCRYL Plus with Triclosan antibacterial.

entries.system_name: Stryker Simplex P Radiopaque Bone Cement
entries.notes: PMMA bone cement. Composition: 75% MMA-styrene copolymer, 15% PMMA, 10% Barium Sulfate (radiopaque). Full dose: 40 g powder + 20 mL monomer. No. 1 selling bone cement in USA. 40+ years clinical use. High fatigue, compressive and flexural strengths. Product code: 6191-1-001 (single), 6191-1-010 (box of 10). Also available as Simplex P with Tobramycin antibiotic (code: 6197-9-001).

High viscosity PMMA bone cement. Unique green colour for contrast vs bone and tissue. 50+ years clinical use. Short dough time (30 sec), long working time. High fatigue strength. Available as PALACOS R (plain) and PALACOS R+G (with Gentamicin). Manufacturer: Zimmer Biomet. Also: PALACOS LV and PALACOS LV+G (low viscosity variants for cartridge mixing systems).

High viscosity PMMA bone cement. Launched 2003. Total setting time approx 13.5 min at 19 deg C. Product code: 3092-040 (40 g single dose). Also SmartSet GHV with Gentamicin (code: 5450-35-500 / 3095-040). Fast initial Gentamicin elution in GHV variant. 10 million fatigue cycles without cracking (GHV). SmartMix delivery system available separately.

entries.system_name: Stryker SmartPump Dual Channel Tourniquet System
entries.notes: Pneumatic tourniquet system. Dual channel for bilateral limb surgery or Bier Block. LCD display for elapsed time and cuff pressure (mmHg). Self-calibration on startup (3 sec). 5-hour internal battery backup (12 V, 2.7 Ah). Dimensions: 17x10x9 in, 12 lbs. Product codes: 5920-011-000 (dual channel unit), 5920-010-091 (battery). Optional printer for tourniquet report.

Battery-powered pulsed lavage for orthopaedic bone cleaning (total joint, revision, cemented/press-fit). Disposable handpiece. Variable speed, trigger lock. High flow and low splash tips. Concurrent suction with splash shield. Rechargeable battery pack option. Product codes include: 0210-114-000 (handpiece with suction/high flow tip), 0210-166-000 (high flow tip + dual spike adapter). Single-use disposable system.
Accessory tip for InterPulse system. High flow for efficient bone bed preparation. Alternative: low splash tip for contamination control. Product code: 0210-166-000 (with dual spike adapter).

Forced-air warming blanket compatible with Bair Hugger Model 775 and 750 warming units. Used in pre-op, OR and PACU. Various blanket sizes for full-body, upper body, lower body. Part of temperature management system to prevent perioperative hypothermia.
